[{"Name":"Maura Wade","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0b9q83dRnIMrXmp4vrUu4QnWMyrrug9VCi8tomlmFxjwOSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would highly recommend Dr. Keel! Being a medical rep for almost 20 years I’ve come across a lot of providers through work and I have to say Dr. Keel is one of the best! Extremely knowledgeable in his field, very professional, and I trust his medical opinion. I had him remove a concerning freckle that popped up. It turned out to be positive for pre-cancerous cells and needed to remove more tissue. Sutures look great and are healing well. The staff is also so friendly and helpful! I have referred friends here as well who have all had wonderful experiences!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Zohreh AkhavanAghdam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7QgtKXXJ8S8lytAD2NHA83A7nqqJJI7ACM-P8lYx3npsESDvYfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had milia removed and a fibrous papule treated here and had a great experience overall. I called a few offices for quotes and this one was the most reasonably priced. Parking can be a bit tight, so I recommend arriving early to find a spot.

The office itself is very clean and well run. They were on time, the medical assistants were kind and welcoming, and I was taken back immediately. The procedure was quick and painless.

Afterward, Dr. Keele recommended tretinoin (which works well and is very cheap) to help prevent future milia and for anti-aging. I appreciated that he didn’t try to sell unnecessary products and kept everything straightforward and medical.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mei-Ling D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuni-YZUBOwhKhhjO9UJsVSaGHjkNCxFFtYCXN9NpymaDjVTHL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Keel and the staff at Pacific Dermatology and Cosmetic Laser Center are the best. Everyone is always kind, professional, and knowledgeable. I have seen several dermatologists in San Diego County, and I always end up going back here. I even switched my insurance plan so I could come back. If you are looking for understanding, patience, and non-judgmental care, I highly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dale Markowski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRr-kWuJwXAhKrbeusSipC-zV7jPI0wrHCoSiD1Acu-8pDF_8S=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everyone at the office are friendly professional and take care of you through whatever procedure or exam you are having done. I have been going here for years concerned about my exposure to the sun and the damage it has caused. Don’t hesitate highly recommend.
Update. Have to go every 3 months now. All my years of worshipping the sun god is coming home to roost. Dr Keel doesn’t mess around with any of my small different cancer skin types. Does what needs to be accomplished. His support staff are friendly and respectful. Thanks.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lET7WfREQM8w4XcGRRKZ-aTst5N6Fr8YIDR25Df6LbCvgoFthpz7FSNNE1l7SEMEdZmCyXDlGlBFKnqk309zKNw-Hz4DkZM4kYZDa-vvvi1-xZEtkciuKhfS3Q98TMnYncmuFleihXms3Pbt","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERHTKdqFrOSew6glxn6iYCERGcbUj5X_Kv115xjl_OxhYfP5Bt9ap2YXS6y0xnkXvs8gpPIPShm8Q-PFyQGFNg5hUYFt7Tk23S8zBVy-uLLtgQFkf2jK8iPnL1Ld6jt99R4ZQj_fyhRwg66","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESGbQMhAVrB7inPM2jZWzweTQW9taZ4IwnxShGrOGfjWk4uTBtQeWifcqoWdyfq9g4qd5gmGv3LTyDfnbXLxTQcS8CpMzVHSYsfoe7Xo_srqMYUVPv_9zGa36morTmg64ZTUBNClYoKrck","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQ76-BQqvYrQgrFcGlilbwP7rEhSavF2bfJqcvEkMzHZdpwuoPU67zZGlHQy3FNVBgNOsikwNWhpFStmT_FB02LOD7rl4OhO8WW8yAQE0BnGhRny63OdJDEURteongp3IwgUkN90Iup8lMG","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQ4phcZko2pVumdd2XNZ7PKJHu20X5amBtSbLuaEyf9Dr5zkaXJJaBsGJHPOl6aCjwzymi89Ma7U4mqeUa25u2Ip_N6F6Qwyn2smUHsIMD4bCgsDin8Bm4fM78NmSxV0O9LuieatTlvpECr","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQCCaKcddV5PsYxfF8OK1s8aSAKcQ6kqkA15lHkYty0u3JqXtKuVzUFZ8HVxbc5CUqtIqjJ_K_pkiQQoAnq-80UaDuPE70fmvsOJsxqyQD7S2SeztXtbmO4RE1OOLr_23P8RLlhv7VXef9q"],"When":"2025-7-25"},{"Name":"Pamela Collins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLak3XIjZSopUfl1KQB4a1LlSA2Ce6CPJoc2tww4PHOLaZ9Xw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The doctor (Dr keel) and staff were SO friendly, positive, and caring. Legitimately one of the better practices I’ve been to. I’m so glad I found pacific laser dermatology!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQ-oEvgq5uEkpuFysOgTA81dLv5aDVlAsODCy3Rs4FWgwoWnag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently  lost my Dermatology Doctor to retirement after 25 years.  After a lot  of research  and recommendations I found Dr. Keel. I just received my second treatment from him and can't say enough how relieved and grateful I am for his care and treatment. His staff is exceptional. His manager, Heather was so patient when I called her lost on my way to the office. She took the time to guide me into my appointment on time. I'm a Grampa with no tech. experience. I use a flip phone and drive a 25 year old truck. Heather's assistant also took my last call for help. Both so patient and helpful. Doctors assistant Theresa  was so polite     and professional. My kids now come to Pacific Dermatology. Sincerely, Grampa Dan and Family.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carl Stockholm","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocICKHTuPXDa6bDdCI-6uMT-vQJh1VWr-vlbu3Egs148s9H5FcI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Keel and his staff are fantastic.  I highly recommend this very well run practice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"cathy oleksy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGXjZEi4ZAgkYjI2XaiNXCAaDph-0yqhG2ItoETF3fMdx5=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Dr. Keel for anyone seeking a skilled dermatologist. He is not only an expert in his field but also genuinely cares about producing natural, beautiful results. Dr. Keel is gentle, kind, and takes a conservative approach, ensuring you feel comfortable every step of the way. His honesty is refreshing—he gives you realistic advice without pushing unnecessary treatments. On top of that, his pricing is very reasonable for the exceptional quality of care he provides. If you're looking for a dermatologist you can trust, Dr. Keel is the one!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Robyn M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLEMC6Yd2G10vZeAli0gdz4vb72JXW5-rGZMmiPgVceuoZ5bOA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love California Cosmetic Institute and will not go anywhere else. Alena is seriously the best! She fixed my forehead and made it look smooth and then she started me on laser hair removal and it’s the best thing I’ve ever done!! My upper lip has no hair now. It’s the best! Alena is gentle and gives you good advice, but isn’t pushy at all. California Cosmetics is my one-stop shop for Botox and skin care. They do it all! Dina gave me the best hydrofacial of my life and Marilyn (the owner) is the most kind, helpful person!! She also does an amazing job at Botox!! I cannot say enough good things about CCI and will not go anywhere else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"NAHLA SALAHELDIN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYDgvx_rnfG8Do5mfzbBnkDVpN55JB8FyGIde8CbfBWMmK2A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I couldn’t be happier with my experience at California Cosmetics Medical Institute! From the moment I walk in, I’m always greeted with warmth and professionalism. The entire team is wonderful, and the environment is so clean, calm, and welcoming — I genuinely look forward to every visit.
A special and heartfelt thank-you to Alena, who has truly made all the difference in my skincare journey. From day one, she took the time to assess my skin, listen to my concerns, and create a personalized treatment plan just for me. We started with chemical peels to prepare and refresh my skin, and then moved on to Pico laser treatments — and the results have been amazing!
My skin is noticeably brighter, smoother, and more even. Years of pigmentation and texture issues have started to fade, and for the first time, I feel confident going out without makeup. Alena’s care, attention to detail, and genuine passion for what she does really shine through. She always makes me feel informed, comfortable, and in the best hands.
If you’re thinking about improving your skin or starting a treatment plan, I can’t recommend California Cosmetics Medical Institute — and especially Alena — enough. She’s the absolute best, and I’m so grateful I found her!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lynette Colletta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXr0atxLRv-40TU2dF7lb9ahjFKEWPxf8m_C3oqbnClVCDXmKE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been a client of California Cosmetic Medical Institute for nearly 20 years and always have a wonderful experience! Marylynn does amazing work, and Alena, Jenna, and Deana each bring their own special talents and care. The team is professional, friendly, and the prices are very reasonable. I always leave feeling refreshed and happy with my results!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"L C gmail","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIkQUbV2DO54KHsYOdc-8PHqTtvn_5st5ki2C5a1RGxsqHU5SuO=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had a CO2 laser treatment with Phoebe, and I can honestly say she is phenomenal! From start to finish, she explained every single step in detail, making the process so easy and putting me completely at ease.

Phoebe’s knowledge and expertise are unmatched. In the skin industry, I know firsthand that going to the right provider is absolutely critical—this is not a treatment you want done by someone without in-depth training. Many spas and doctors’ offices have lasers, but that doesn’t mean every provider truly knows how to use them safely and effectively.

Phoebe is the real deal—highly trained, extremely skilled, and with a clear passion for what she does. My results have exceeded my expectations, and I couldn’t be happier!

If you’re considering a CO2 laser treatment, I highly, highly recommend going to Phoebe. She truly knows her craft and will ensure you get the best possible outcome.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tracy Vandenbroeke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmt_ZRCH45105DlfhUrBSezHm8EJXPyg7d-pep0X2Ec5-ogIg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Marylyn is hands down the best injector I’ve ever experienced. I recommend CCMI to anyone who asks","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenny Taing","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjXy9SC0xVNCk4PrWYJrNbfxeax4qyqlBMsnYFnNCrwFplEA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jenna is very nice and excellent at what she does. She is a professional and I would definitely recommend her to anybody who needs good skin care.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tammy Ramsay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHUy7NmmHYuVJHzaBPKZ-ASE4Dd0d0XPgNahDHglQZVd3R4Xbs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just had a laser treatment by Tiffany. [{"Name":"payvand kamrani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVO7w3li0LhOHMyW9hGj3Sz1ffKN1V6Fp_wN9rwvr7ATP15wwOX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Fabi is truly exceptional!!! This was my first time ever having injections, and I was incredibly nervous walking into the appointment. From the moment she sat down with me, she made me feel calm, heard, and completely at ease.

She took the time to really understand my goals and the fact that I wanted natural results without being over done!! I looked at her Instagram and saw that she had treated patients just like me. She explained everything clearly and thoughtfully, which gave me so much confidence moving forward with sculptra and some filler in my jawline and chin! and I even did lip filler for the first time which I was so nervous about but it looks so natural and fits my face.

It looked great afterwards and I am happy with the results.
Her team was great and followed up with me after the treatment!

Can't wait to come back and continue my treatments with her!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sandra Rapalee Albrektsen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3FUkFUZerDyS-ub9OteR3iraWgh_FIx5hl0sc2Q6U23kswpHH=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been going to Dr. Fabi since 2017.  However, the entire office has excellent doctors.  Through the years if she was out of town, I've seen others.  You will find an excellent doctor here-all are 5/5.  I know your 'group on' and going down to TJ is much cheaper.  But, speaking from experience you are running a risk of looking unnatural.  I had a bad injection and the money spent to fix it convinced me to find a professional office.  Good doctors and excellent, top shelf lasers cost $$.  Save up if needed then run over and look fabulous!  It is so worth it in the long run.  I literally have had every laser, filler, and botox (all of them) and couldn't recommend Cosmetic Laser Dermatology more!  Shout out to my fav nurse Stephanie who takes excellent care of me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kayla Saint-Fleur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFi77vl4Xo69x_Tu9HN0kHtbZQnYcnNl9UZYeAJ3NE4NMhZw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience from start to finish. The Beauty lounge is very bright, clean, and all staff are very friendly and informative.

I did my first lip fillers. I had Cindy and she did amazing. I showed her my inspiration picture and told me how many sessions I will need to achieve the look, and how she was going to place the filler. She also pointed out the minor imperfections of my lips before filler so I can see the difference after adding that volume.

I will definitely be coming back for my follow up in a couple months.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marjan V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHGnO7FOzn0G0DV6zVpam6XJXBFXJKLk8SWNsAvJbJfGiWE2Uy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Wu provides exceptional care.  He is so personable, easy to talk to, and is extremely knowledgeable.  He is patient, kind, and a great listener and communicator. I trust his care and expertise.  The staff is caring and will get the answer to any questions I may have.  What I also like is that the providers all take pride in learning about the newest technologies and sharing that information with their patients.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"KW","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3QvQdHQXs3UYtS9Xc0fZEC_e3g3kIa5PZ40o9SjwK1dGho4A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Farzaneh is incredibly warm, kind, and compassionate. Additionally, she is a very knowledgeable medical aesthetician and is highly skilled at her craft. I felt like I was in good hands while she did a thorough examination of my skin, and I appreciated her taking the time to walk me through all of the procedures for my customized facial. Everything from the environment, the explanations, and the procedure itself were calming and relaxing. My skin is already so much healthier and happier after my first session, so I'm looking forward to coming back for more treatments!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alison Hosking","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5e11lqJ0md9LYnDdpAV3gUlt6R13WmqoJO0GxQTwPeWZM1rOfxw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Farzaneh was very attentive and worked out a plan for my facial.  She explained every step and made sure I was comfortable with each.
I was wrapped in a cocoon of heat totally relaxed with a gentle face massage , a face mask of honey etc and I fell asleep.
Thank you for a wonderful experience and my beautiful soft clear face.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Haley Murphy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKVQOoPjGme6a7if5Y4oEt35eEQTvebYTUUDnhgUHxwLR8JQA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Boen was amazing! She was very thorough, informative and patient. She listened to all my concerns and answered all questions. She has great bedside manner and I am very appreciative of all her recommendations for my treatment plan. Excellent experience overall!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nasrin “Naz” Gohar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPe3gaRj-Qa-zLMGeYBfAChaJj6L3zlH_g_nfEr8ZLWBMb-N5q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Jameson T. Loyal – A Standout in a Field That’s Lost Its Focus

I’ve seen Dr. Loyal twice now, and intentionally waited before writing this—because in the world of cosmetic dermatology, initial impressions can be misleading. Too often, the results don’t hold up once the “fluff” settles. But in this case, I can now say with full confidence: the results are exceptional, and consistent.

I didn’t walk in asking for discounts or package deals—I came in expecting one thing: a result worth the money. That’s hard to find these days. What I got was not only excellent results, but also an experience that felt precise, respectful, and refreshingly professional.

Dr. Loyal listens. He doesn’t rush. He doesn’t chat over your head with his assistant while poking your face like you're not there (a habit I find incredibly disrespectful and sadly common among his peers). Instead, he is fully focused—present in the room—and that shows in the grace and quality of his work. He clearly takes pride in what he does.

I’ve been to many top surgeons, and have tried other clinics for lasers and injectables—but I came back to Dr. Loyal, and I’m glad I did. Now I’m a loyal client—not of the clinic generally, but of Dr. Loyal specifically. He is the reason I return.

The staff is also very professional and kind, which adds to the overall experience. But make no mistake—Dr. Loyal is the real differentiator here. If you’re tired of superficial experiences and you want results backed by real attention to detail, this is your doctor.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Alex Menez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWLfaIYToJlJh4YLjl1oYk9HLyDhj49EPZu3dX1vP-XvpInrK0U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"PA Krishna Patel is my "go to" for dermatology needs. I live far from the Schweiger Clinic, but I won't go to any other. Ms Patel is friendly but very capable. She asks pertinent questions and examines/looks at the affected skin. And she gives the right medication. She must be busy, though, because it's not easy to get an appointment.  However, when one is a longtime patient, like I am, you can tell the scheduler so and you would be fit in.
Or you can ask for a video visit. Anyway, it is worth waiting for Ms. PATEL.
Her Assistant, Mariah, is also very capable. Her smile is very expensive, though, still you can be sure she sends the right prescribed medication s to your right pharmacy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chelsey Ciasulli","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJf6g-YZT8tgryUdnpQXptnSqDLi1yx2MjSdKLBdL1qEzu1pA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beyond pleased with my experience here. From the front desk, to the MA, to the dermatologist himself. Daisy at the front desk was so sweet & I could not recommend Dr Blumenstrauch more. He is very knowledgeable, kind, he listens and is collaborative with care. The world really needs more doctors like him! I found him from reviews online and needed to do so myself because he is truly amazing. The only negative reviews I saw were wait times. I personally only waited a short time to be seen but having been to multiple dermatologists and getting sub par care at best, I would have waited hours to see Dr B knowing I am well cared for. He is well worth any wait! I am so happy to have found a dermatologist I trust! Thank you :)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diani Lo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXZpk5gSnI-u0GIO_34sQqNje1BFZRwQtkO8zPw_2ySNaq0A6-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If you are looking for compassionate dermatology care, I strongly suggest going somewhere else.

My experience at Schweiger Dermatology Group with Julia Kwan and her team was extremely disappointing. The front desk staff did not greet or acknowledge patients, yet were quick to collect co-pays, which immediately set a cold and transactional tone. I also waited over 30 minutes past my appointment time only to have a rushed visit that lasted about 10 minutes.

During intake, the assistant repeatedly responded to my medical concerns with “that’s going to cost you more,” instead of explaining the process or addressing what I was actually asking. It felt dismissive and uncomfortable.

When Dr. Kwan entered, the appointment felt hurried and impersonal. My concerns were brushed aside, and I left feeling unheard, unsupported, and with absolutely zero resolution to the issues I came in for. Patients deserve clear communication, empathy, and professionalism, and unfortunately that was not my experience here.

I hope management takes feedback like this seriously because the culture reflected during my visit needs significant improvement.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenny H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCXgOImQj29g2w2ghLr-f5lsdEjp5yJp--VqId_ueHY7rQVLIYUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We have been going to this place for a year.  In that time, they have been acquired by the Schweiger Dermatology Group and the service has severely declined.  When you call them, it is impossible to reach a live person.  Instead, you have to talk to an AI assistant.  My daughter needed a refill of her acne medication, so I called yesterday.  When the AI assistant asked me what I needed, I said “refill request,” and the AI assistant said that I had asked to cancel my next appointment and canceled that appointment.  I immediately said “customer service,” but even then, I couldn’t reach a live person and was transferred to a voicemail that said I should leave a detailed message that would be returned.  It has now been over 24 hours and no one has called me back.  My daughter is still missing her medication and we no longer have an appointment, so we will be taking our business elsewhere.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Teresa Mendez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLY6JtcX6DEwnKNFpbPUrPSVfEoMlqrDIJ3oQ3fojYtHPvM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"while i have no complaints about the service provided i have big issues with their billing.  they are trying to defraud me out of $50 & the billing department (including their escalations division) is impossible to deal with.  they keep making up reasons for this fake $50 charge.  i have submitted a complaint with the BBB & i refuse to get ripped off by this mega corporation.  look up schweiger dermatology group (they own this practice).  they are multi office & they have tons of complaints regarding false charges/double billing.  do NOT go here if you value honesty.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3cJAnbyQnHmTJ0W3fYYDSwX5E6I7GKWsVIBcojQF2Dmevdg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"TERRIBLE!! DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY!! DO NOT SEE JULIA KWAN!
My pcp wanted me to get a whole body skin check due to family history of skin cancer, I am pregnant and had a few spots of concern to look at. I made a list of 9 spots and was seen by Julia Kwan. She was very rude, inappropriate and rushed me. After 5 minutes of being in the office she asked me to hurry because she had other patients to get to. She said they typically only look at 2-3 areas of concern each appointment. I told her I was never told that when making my appointment and I paid a $70 co pay for her time and let her know she had only been in the office for 5 minutes. She did not take my concern seriously. There is a spot on my face she said could “potentially be pre-cancerous or a scab” and asked if I’ve picked it. I said no and all she recommended was to keep it lotioned for 2 weeks and if the scab doesn’t fall off then it could be pre-cancerous. NO HELP! What a waste of time and money. I do not normally write bad reviews but felt compelled to do so to hopefully save others time and money.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ifrah Sheesfarooqui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1I98TQWDU2aGvzK3EOJsV-XEsKuDQgfoOsxopORT2FcYFBv7qmA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've had a pleasant experience here for my daughter. The staff form the front desk to the nurses and the PAs have all been very kind and helpful. The PA Melissa was great, but she recently moved and we saw Krishna who was also exceptional. She was so patient and kind with my daughter and made her feel comfortable! Would highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary Swetka Yu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFcN8snrcuxR0bPKwvr7TDJRzRSSRmfGOsQaebu3ZnjbeaOQA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a relief to know that a bump on Michael’s skin was not dangerous! Dr. Chan was quick and efficient  and was able to give options for treatment. Photo show Michael with his guide dog, Devo.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lER3BTvhzLJgceSu03HPs5DDHNIMEUXladi_znbz-sZIUnu1jSgyou6MJYq7PoT0NDgovAChnQMI_jiiljFM15iHYxDa269vDMf_ySZ4QOhrhDWc4Jcnj6hxVS0EyL5RcUr4AfiX"],"When":"2025-5-1"}]

[{"Name":"Rowena Sales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItK9vB5DEsQoL8OLxZYemc73bkuIGneJzBclzYFhYjZW3LsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently went to SoCal Skin and Surgery for the UltraClear laser to treat several spots on my neck, and I couldn't be happier with the experience. I was expecting some discomfort, but the procedure was almost completely painless. The laser was quick, the precision was amazing and Dr. Wang was so gentle. The medical assistants went over the care instructions in detail with me to ensure a smooth recovery. My neck healed much faster than I expected, and the skin looks perfectly smooth now. If you've been putting off ultraclear laser because you're worried about pain, I highly recommend SoCal Skin and Surgery for it. I can’t wait to go back and get all the other treatments that I want done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alan Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQvtgUxSseCQSM23UsWQ2pDCgiAGxuV1SmVJggy0bA2PCeNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a great experience with Dr. Azimi! The staff was super friendly, the office was clean and welcoming, and Dr. Azimi took the time to explain everything clearly. I felt really comfortable and well taken care of. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gil Roberts","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ58Npl8clmyZBDNRgyoM-cvHhxhs8Z6O2PgtrZ0bs3safMQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"SoCal Skin and Surgery exceeded my expectations. The staff was professional, prompt, and very organized from start to finish. Communication was clear, the appointment ran on time, and the procedure itself was quick and smooth. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a professional, efficient, and well-run practice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elise C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXz1EOcLTWDKfAYZ-lXkBxLsQ-QJXj7GmeJSjn38rHkXrLDzbAx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommend. So glad I found them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Reza Iranpour","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLbfIr3SiwrFCgzwQNU77oT2seP-IDUL4YTF_nBSxyTYikQAg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I used to have some skin irritation on the right side of my face when shaving, just below my cheek…
After I had a quick appointment with Dr. Wang at SoCal Skin and Surgery, she discussed the issue and gave me a few friendly creams to try. I used them for a while, but for recently I have stopped using them entirely.  This is because the skin on the right side is just as healthy as the left…

Thank you very much.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Grant Szymanski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCyq75_2BKS_IYaE04htdMi-fodpztUFFtnBQuvpTmXzjK-lw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a great experience here with Dr. Wang! I would definitely recommend SoCal Skin and Surgery to anyone interested!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"V H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXP-aF8av1Avb6AJRsfODsFTgEwEW8y5gCu9uekZvln0L9_8tc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I was referred by my Dr for health not cosmetic to get help with a mass, I was treated cold and basically I didn’t matter, my mass was never looked at, I was basically stood while the Dr sat in a room n did absolutely nothing, I am completely defeated n no one should ever be treated this way, then I was sent to a room with a women who basically was cold n uncaring n told me I can apply for some credit ( made zero sense since this is medical by my Dr, well after driving over an hour and going in a building that looked like it was just put up with rooms with beds n no others there I was completely uncomfortable, I left with absolutely no help no hope, this is very sad I wouldn’t wish this treatment on anyone with my insurance approving it, I don’t lie I don’t rarely ask for help yet kick me farther down I say, I’m not exaggerating I’m honest n I’d never treat anyone this way n this treatment can have people give up but they seemed cold n zero questions answered n what Dr doesn’t look at the problem I say? well I’m far from done on making sure no one endures this treatment or is treated in humane","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sandy Arriaga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5mZMlCvF-IXtUA9dKviIBHaEvW5VeJahWTL4ryO2qTcbiNrErOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I was really excited and looking forward to getting a procedure done with the facility. Unfortunately, when I received my quote for a tummy tuck it was very high. After doing some research I noticed that I was quoted a price that was too high for just that procedure.
Note: 14,000 for just a tummy tuck and does not include pre op blood work etc.
I enjoyed my experience with during my initial consultation,  the PA was great and she answered all my questions.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lERUdvJIWul7GsE5ZoE7NuXe5lWpM4aSiSccyUF3q76PKlZx_wbaRl12Wx28oU0K5MRc91J69KXylfSaiuBVfgNajC4cZ8bxO_FLs187w3ns_MxpgR_xlqsdscceEL3R8OOfE9i_og"],"When":"2022-2-12"},{"Name":"Ambar Elizabeth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDVZTnMad093XwKcpGfkqUqPm4BjYUEtqdL6glrLtNg78KijdK=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"*Based on Consultation Experience* I'm sad to say I'm leaving 1 star! The patient consultant Alma was so sweet. But the experience was not. I couldn't even get through the quote! I went to the consultation, Alma suggested Dr Hu was great to see him so I wouldn't wait so long for a surgery date. Well! It's been a year and even after a zoom consultation I still haven't got my quote! I probably would of had surgery already.
I called in August of 2020 they gave me an appointment of November 2,2020. I left with a follow up appointment with Alma aware my pricing would be honored before they went up,due to my appointment date. I FaceTime with Dr.Hu in December 2020 and that's it I never heard back Alma or a rep... I Instagram messaged I emailed and nothing. It's now July 29,2020...So I guess maybe if your not insta-famous the Dr is not interested? I don't know but I was ready to see Dr. also be aware the consuls with the PA not the Dr. I was told it's the same thing... you will be in the office at least 3 hours, and the PA speaks fast and is passive aggressive as she draws out the procedures... with they I was still willing to get a procedure however, it wasn't meant to be.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lESP0UPuJ3Q319j78QQqd_sk9cHXyg4aEHMIooOo0pEfPLvSIkyXGO8SwruwBhiA96lfxWSyuHGzhuKE69z-yBTOr-1ShQnWR8UMvM4rSx10Nsfxo9M3tj-flcz_-WAjrp2i0bpw","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lER_bx7P4aWHdHOQm7kAL_uE4tBC6tI4oQgqNYvlJuEPmw5zfap4gx-JqtPVZ6_f3kbjQ5uundNGT12jk-BGoh5Deit92H7B6Kpa55tYuiWI_1-Q-hv7u83ahu1-KeeEGILexaSf","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lES-l1HhX0bFwFLvpL6eVAGVO2nVh9-MGUbl2EcU4iXcQvrgSr5YwCi-u9SsEhfxvLED-wNtyIimWvlI34N1g0eXHO27AKlTStml8PSvpuADItSDdr4nJnmfypicou1crSiU_2Nauw","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQ4OMpfuNrVceykEc4JaxIoWLc_q7xheCU-rC4uU1YuS203HpwuYKc98S5dVgLZWpXA6vnO0gCgvE-SwdjujbrfJy5UO4kvpEjI8Pf0wYaO7MGR5ISD1leN4_rQj7C7CmSSZXdc"],"When":"2021-7-29"},{"Name":"Mike Hampson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQdUxgr7vaJ4nSCnMHz16lnG3WCKmhFGkZ-l7nEv2ZrcV6n0A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We're putting off the surgery for a few months until I can take some time off of work, but when I called Plastic Surgery Institute they spent a ton of time with me on the phone and answered every question I had without trying to pressure or sell me on anything. [{"Name":"maria chavez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoijks-Q64M2rXg3IGGjiH3EWsj454LuSkTV-9p8GGPdOaFMh6Wg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. White truly changed my life. After more than two years of going from doctor to doctor without answers, I had almost lost hope. I was suffering from constant migraines, jaw pain, tinnitus, heart palpitations, dizziness, heartburn, acid reflux, joint pain, extreme fatigue, and a constant desire to sleep. I was even diagnosed with vertigo, yet no one could identify the true cause of my symptoms.

From my very first visit, Dr. White took the time to listen with genuine compassion and care. He approached my case with exceptional knowledge, patience, and attention to detail. Through a thorough evaluation and BHRT (bioidentical hormone replacement therapy), he identified what others had missed. The results have been truly life-changing. I feel like a completely new person—my energy is back, my symptoms are gone, and I finally feel like myself again.

I drive four hours to receive my treatment, and it is absolutely worth it. BHRT with Dr. White has restored my quality of life, and I would make that drive again without hesitation. He never rushes appointments and truly makes you feel heard, supported, and cared for.

Dr. White combines outstanding medical expertise with genuine heart. His commitment to healing his patients and finding the root cause—not just treating symptoms—is rare. I am profoundly grateful to him and recommend him wholeheartedly to anyone who has been struggling without answers. He truly gave me my life back. ❤️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Denise Marie Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoeB31_ywDkXThsOJsycDROZ8DNXnC4MmjNW7UZ3APVL_Sv8rC=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr White, Literally changed my life! Larry D.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yolanda Gorecki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLoVSQ9w6yrNlfCfrb7EjV2172bh7f5CWdNuTztJlyCDXQIXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If you are considering this institute, DON'T!! I made the mistake of not considering the bad reviews on here. On June 27th I had reconstructive BBL surgery with Dr. Mowlavi. I explicitly informed the surgeon what my dissatisfactions were. He assured me my concerns would be fixed. 4 months and 25 thousand dollars later I went in for a follow up and complaint that my results were worse than when I initially walked in. After reviewing me he divulged they can re-fix it for an additional 9 thousand dollars. This is extremely unethical and dishonest. My BBL looks 10 times worse resulting in constantly hiding it with long layers of clothing because of how enormous and uneven they look. They should not have given me their word they would repair something they couldn’t fix. The least they can do is take responsibility at their cost. And Claudia, the consulting coordinator, is only nice up until she receives payment and you sign the contract. You don't exist after that.

-Olga Damian.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristofer Piros","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL4jlbStVuJ9WYSwCkU1V_eo2vHUmMX7LQyXHZ9cdr-RWjzrQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Outstanding service! She and her team were all very kind and I feel like they really took the time to make sure I was comfortable.  The experience couldn't have been better. Katie and Chelsea are my favorite for sure.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/geougc-cs/AMG9lEQpir5ezsjug5NHk4npvlY9roIi8Hjjp5GessusN2bsyMKus81fIGvax6w4QDByRACrAsg8LU-WcAIO4yuZDc3VfypzAJ4vQ_bAcGxPPVUicmRDCGTrLy0cULZZqfAe-WVZqFcTEQ"],"When":"2018-5-25"},{"Name":"Jill Wehrly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJk5i8xxfIEKgwzcosRSAYJXhbmaTmo1AVXwgz0nRcvbttb=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I rarely post but I  highly recommend Dr Welsh. I have seen her for over 15 years and am so grateful for her medical expertise, her detailed approach to aesthetics, and her top notch diagnostic skills. She has made significant impacts with me and my family members. She was the only dermatologist that was able to diagnose a rare skin disease for me where so many other dermatologist got it wrong. She has spotted itty bitty skin cancer and gave me a top notch referral for treatment. I would have never seen it until it was far more advanced. Dr Welch’s clinical skills are excellent and she has helped me many times with family members with tricky skin situations. In fact, a family member has seen 10 doctors for a skin condition and not one of those highly recommended /esteemed doctor’s could figure it out. Dr Welch was the only who got it right . I feel very grateful for that . I also appreciate that if she is not the right person for a treatment, she has no problem referring you to someone who is- Dr Welch is a smart and confident doctor!  While Dr Welch has recently focused her expertise recently more on esthetics , she really considers the whole person. She gives great recommendations and I appreciate her patience with me because I think I probably ask her the same questions about my skin  every time  I see her. Ha!  She sets realistic goals for her clients and will help you feel and look great. If you want a doctor to treat you as a whole person , Dr Welch is for you!

I also have to say, I really enjoy her nurses and  staff. Very nice and courteous crew. A happy environment

Jill","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura Kyriazis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtPSHbwo6-M8113Qrb7wtjkCxd7Oo2XEjBOYJ4TQNOjN5Qa9g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Personally and individually, Dr. Welsh is the REAL Five star Dermatologist in Northern California, worth every penny for her precise injections, treatments and bed side manner. Yes, there are delays sometimes, yes there are many other patients and a filled to the brim schedule, but face it, you are paying to get an appt. with a Harvard Trained MD. You get what you pay for. If you are looking for cheap, you are going to look just that, Cheap. Worth the wait. Worth the money.  Your face is worth it. Laura Kyriazis, ESQ.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Suzie Yang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJBDoaOf34t4x-8ujBTdKUsP-UljrmVRoFMGC6K5kbx5qlbPDKKA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been seeing Dr. Welsh regularly since I was 30 years old.  I am now 50 and always feel confident telling people my age because they are always shocked and say they thought I was in my late 30’s, early 40’s. The only downside to going to this office is knowing that one day Dr. Welsh will retire.  Dr.  Welsh is hands down the best cosmetic dermatologist around.  I love referring my friends to her as they are always thrilled with the results.  Thank you Dr. Welsh!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diane Waye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUdRPAtYMDT0pgFa7j5pNk6Ur7A8tZYgc4HMZPgAQRtsy5YiM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Welsh has been my favorite dermatologist for over 20 years - I'm pretty sure she is the reason I don't have skin cancer from my careless youth ;)  She (and her staff) always make me feel good when I am there and I get great results w everything I've tried (including fillers).  Kathleen Welsh is a perfectionist and a true artist!

Dr Welsh knows my style (she knows I don't want to look "over done") and gives (on request) great advice for what I really need (instead of what I thought I needed) often saving me $$.  I trust her completely (based on 2 decades of stellar results)!

I was introduced to Dr Welsh by a product rep friend (it's part of her job to know everybody in the industry) as a wonderful person and excellent doctor.  I have always been glad of every visit!

Recently I tried her cleansing pads while camping - who knew you could get refreshed glowing skin w/out water?  I'm one of those people who breaks out if I miss cleansing morning or night, so these are little gems.

Honestly, I cannot lavish enough praise on Dr Welsh (and her staff) for excellent care and great results!  I'm pretty sure Dr Welsh really does love skin!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iwona Hohnloser","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1gzSrBx6gJZihRypdcLPcf3FoL4NctspDJ4xbwo4G_LuYaZ4Z=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been going to Dr. Welsh for few years now. I had been looking for a dermatologist for botox and fillers throughout the Bay Area and Europe. I was so happy to finally find Dr. Welsh! She is an amazing "artist " with the syringe -- never makes me look like I had something done. My own children, husband, and sisters never noticed that I had gotten "work done" to my face. I always get compliments on how great and young I look. Equally as important, Dr. Welsh is extremely thoughtful with how she practices. She always takes her time to listen to what I am looking for, and only suggests alternatives when they are best suited for the results I want. Never has she pushed anything on me like some other doctors have.
Most importantly, I am so fortunate to have been her patient. I had been seeing other dermatologists while abroad, but when I returned to the Bay Area and visited Dr. Welsh for a botox treatment, she identified that I had an extremely early stage melanoma, so early that other physicians had not identified it or been concerned. I insisted that it was nothing, as I had had the mole for years. Dr. Welsh insisted on a biopsy - thank God !  She was incredibly caring as she gave me the news, and reassured me that everything would be okay given my early stage diagnosis. She not only referred me to the top specialists in the area for the Mohs surgery, but she continued to followed up with me throughout my treatment.
Dr. Welsh is simply is one of the best, most caring doctors I have ever had. I have no words to describe how thankful I am to her.
P.s. I finally told my husband that that I was getting Botox and that Dr. Welsh was the one that discovered the melanoma. While he is pretty anti-cosmetic procedures, my hubby has now given me a full OK for botox...as long as I will continue to see Dr. Welsh :-)))","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Katina DiGiovanna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-lLNt9dDPpMELWsQ4ZcJ5TOohnDNvcu6UxyiW1sdsdIhpisDa=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been using Dr Kathleen Welsh for over 15 years and highly recommend her. I receive V-Beam treatments for my rosacea and my skin looks amazing. I'm turning 52 this year and can easily pass for 42. Thanks Dr Welsh for keeping my skin beautiful!","Images":null,"When":""}]

So good experience for me all around so..more to come.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ginger Bugbee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6h-VNw37mJwccO4IWlcR4CnEXcqwKcgVyzcBU2C2Fa1n5YQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Braun is very nice and took the time I needed to answer all the questions I had. She was thorough and helpful. I didn’t get the nurses name but she was great as well. The office staff is also very helpful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marisol Pagan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSBb4IL4qICwoEDZ_P1xilniOCNGl5DFkk3rft0TlEFbTqDfk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best part of this place is the location. Very easy to find lots of parking. Directions to find the office pretty self explanatory. Being someone with ptsd at times when triggered I tend to forget in the moment no matter how brief it maybe it’s distracting.

People who aren’t familiar with my condition they think the worst. They say “ first impressions “ are important. As much as that may be true it’s not for people like this. All of us are different however, we are not any different then what people deem as “ normal.

My experience inside the office was more than I could have asked for with their clinical staff. I don’t expect them all to be cheerful because, I don’t always have that face all the time. That  doesn’t mean I’m in a bad mood. I’m simply in my own moment of peace.

They all greeted me in the best professional accommodating way. Not knowing my condition as far as I know but even if they were told before hand, it only shows how much more they are in the jobs they are meant to be in their “ purpose” as I call it. That’s what you need to be when you’re in the job of your purpose.

Because when you’re not? Medical field or idk maybe a store like cvs or target just as an example. You forget that everyone else around you is just as valuable as you are and deserve the same empathy and care. Like you do your loved ones. Your mother a child friend you consider family. This is my mindset EVERYDAY despite what others assume they think they know.

So even though I met them for a brief moment no matter how professional on their end it was. To me  it made me feel much more better than they know. So I hope on days they don’t feel like their enough on their bad days. That they know they’re much more valuable to people disability or not.  Thank you","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jasen Nichols","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSUHMPn8nAw2lEZfmQEMHm8yCFGfXf_Z3kDL_8lcHa6_KZUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My experience was fantastic, upon entering I noticed how clean and well organized the lobby and space was , along with bright and cheerful staff, I felt very welcomed and at ease.
The practitioner was very proficient and friendly, while providing excellent service and or care..
I felt safe and would highly recommend West Dermatology to a friend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrea Leahy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7euomdzofrbvmntlv2plHQEbFW_C8F1THGo4pg5lHVuzgB6O8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an exceptionally positive experience wit this office! The staff is kind and helpful. I got in for my appointment on time and all my questions were answered with patience and concern. I can’t say enough positive things!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIDegHNR2motIXMQ8NuzE4m-u8bP_I4iIqXRCbxQ6LC0FBnyA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just had an initial skin exam and took care of a few moles I wanted removed. My first time at a dermatologist and it was a great experience! The team was friendly, professional and checked me in super quick! I was afraid id be upsold botox but I wasn't. They offer it but no pushy sales. Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Abbey B.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLpEB95KZCKldNAXpex3bbk-gSODOLgmpoB0JXLI-NbdAdUFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Most unprofessional group of people I’ve ever had the displeasure of dealing with- and I work in the industry. Waited over 2 months for the appointment, they want you there 15 minutes early according to texts on day of- forms say 20-30 minutes early. Why? I barely was sat 20 minutes after my actual appointment time. Everyone and I mean EVERYONE is on their phones. There’s about 4 people in the back just standing around and two/three in the front. No one is doing anything aside from one girl in the front answering calls. Asinine. Then, after I have to stand up to remind them of my presence- my chart is lost?!! How do you lose my chart?? There’s NO ONE HERE. I waited for the doctor for another 13 minutes that never came as I can here the three girls in the back talking about me (yes, I can hear you) and as I walk out of the room to dismiss myself I hear “oh there she is”.

So, you can’t see patients on time, talk about patients in common areas that can be heard behind closed doors, and everyone’s on their personal phones with patients private details on their computer screens which is violating HIPAA. go anywhere else. I’ll be calling my insurance company.

Also to update- I scheduled with a FEMALE DOCTOR not a CPN. WHY WOULD YOU SCHEDULE WITH A MALE CPN WHEN I CALLED FOR A SPECIFIC FEMALE DOCTOR????","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lyndsi Okh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvP8ANYZDLd2-fmzrEVlp8BYfetxlmLAHN9lqaNieX1gzOCABt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I unfortunately had a pretty bad experience here. I’ll start by saying the nurses are very nice and the only reason that I gave one star instead of zero.

I went for my normal skin check and saw a very rude doctor (who left the practice but still) and made me feel very stupid for asking questions. They forced me into getting three spots removed when it wasn’t necessary. I now have a horrible scar on my back because of their “policy” of removing three moles “just to check.” Unfortunately these spots all scarred and were not necessary to remove at all.

I was so unhappy with my experience here and now I have a brand new shiny dark scar on my back that I have to live with forever. I recommend avoiding this place at all costs.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I first came to him with a chemical burn that was pretty complex: fairly deep, both red and hyperpigmented, and pitted in some places due to how it originally healed.

I think most dermatologists would find this challenging to resolve, and I wasn’t sure how much could even be done. But Dr. He recommended a treatment path that has already tremendously improved my scar. I’m so relieved to see it looking this much better.

I’ve also had numerous other treatments with him on the face and body (sclerotherapy, CO2, PRP, Jessner’s peel, KTP laser), and I plan to have many more. Every treatment I’ve had so far has delivered wonderful results. Dr. He is an absolute gem!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caroline Burnett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1qyd8SmkMaOkXjBjX7_YeSzEWdbG92ZJwHN9P89KBNo2iMFVuoA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Steven He is the best of the best. He is a top notch doctor and a perfectionist —exactly what I want in someone treating my face. He has helped me achieve my skin goals expertly. And, the best part is — he is a sincerely kind person who is a pleasure to get to see. Thank you Dr He! (Also this office is run very professionally and I really appreciate their excellent customer service from the receptionists to the nurses!)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"デベローマーガレット","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRB2ri1Pg9xsGKYM2dp1ZHeGeyb9mze_-z-cmqIVws3mokfM4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There are two doctors that have  changed my life. One is a GI surgeon that performed emergency abdominal surgery, and the other is Dr. He.

I decided to prioritize anti-aging when I turned 28, and began seeing cosmetic dermatologists regularly for botox, filler, and the occasional laser treatment. While they were all very well-known, and competent, not one was able to accomplish the difference with just one treatment that Dr. He has managed on ALL: lasers, threads, filler, Thermage, Morpheus, Kybella...

Anti-Aging: Dr. He is a master with threads and filler. Particularly with threads, his understanding of facial structure and vectors allows him to accomplish miracles I would think impossible without surgery, or without an absurdly large budget. He has sharpened my jawline, provided lift in my forehead to improve eyelid sagging, removed a double chin, and molded my face into a more triangular shape that I have only seen in LA fashion models (certainly not a younger me).

Rosacea: My rosacea used to be so awful that I used two concealers under foundation. Now on the days that I don't go into the office I run around outside wearing no makeup at all.

Surgery Scars: A major GI surgery a few years ago left a huge ugly scar down my abdomen. Post-laser treatment it is now only a few inches long, and barely noticeable. You can imagine the first appointment I booked after my surgery this year.

Rash/Acne: I have been hospitalized twice for infected dermatitis that was very difficult for my former dermatologists to manage. Dr. He has prevented elongated outbreaks, and was able to do so even during the height of COVID (sometimes even working off of grainy photos). As for acne, I wish my migraines could be kept under better control.

This is only a small sample of what he has done for me. After the last 4 years, I do not think I would EVER go to anyone else with any cosmetic OR medical dermatologic issue. Even on most other general medical concerns, I will ask him before I ask any other doctor precisely because the combination of his expertise, knowledge, and compassion is not easily met with, in any field.

But for the reader, perhaps the most salient point is that I look BETTER than I did at 28, and I just turned 37.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aaron Peterson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLu-mJM7hlA7rlg4AZ1sIMH8ORwLPBm-kFgnSPGV6jwNImS3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"He cured my failure extremely well with excellent failure management. What da hail would definitely recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Papa Lim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8XAqcssmi7XDwxzrnYYTYBAjk2rp5MUJecH-o5CoKyYt5raHTNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What the hail","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Center for Cosmetic Surgery

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Rebecca Mahler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWemHpCUu3tmAgMdLiLmY48gvIHnznclZpL5SjAo4gJQxmt68TF=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I want to sincerely thank Dr. Alavi and his team for the amazing care they provided me.

Long story short—I had gone to both my primary care doctor and a specialist about the extreme pain I was experiencing in my breast, but they didn’t feel it was serious enough to take action. Still in pain and looking for answers, I turned to Dr. Alavi, whom I had trusted before for a breast lift. He and his team immediately stepped in, got me scheduled, and quickly took care of my medical issue.

The surgery went smoothly, and once again to my surprise, Dr. Alavi even took time out of his day to personally call and check in on me afterward. That level of compassion and professionalism means so much.

I’m incredibly grateful for Dr. Alavi and his team. They truly care about their patients, and it shows every step of the way.

If you’re looking for a doctor who truly cares and a team that goes above and beyond, I highly recommend Dr. Alavi and his staff!❤️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"pri c","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKI0zaJPxRucTD-Y2zH0iIS4QnKeyTSWVo2rTDECSc6zETxAg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Alavi is a true artist. He really cares about every detail. I was so hesitant about getting a breast augmentation, and after going to many surgeons for consultation, I knew that he was the guy to go to!
From day 1 the care has been excellent, the entire staff.
I am 4 weeks PO and already feel normal. My incisions were so precise and I will have no scarring!!!
Also, I did not lose any sensation in my nipples or breasts, and this was VERY important to me!
Surgery day was a breeze, I woke up from a great nap barely in pain. No nausea either. A bit of discomfort till day 3 maybe day 4. A week in I was ready to get back to normal life but I still took it easy keeping in mind all the the instructions.
Dr. Alavi recommended me the perfect size for my goals, and I am happy I listened to him!
He is the best at what he does, I am so happy I found him! My breasts look phenomenal already, cant wait to see how they fluff! When he says he's a perfectionist he really means it.
He corrected a horrible mistake made by another surgeon and I am SO thankful for that!!!! Thank you Dr. Alavi and team, I couldn't have asked for better!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Heather Moreno","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJcKVjZuvDaM2XA2gpsCVqUbMYkaYi-LyZemDGbU-vjIcQFBKBI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"He deformed me! Stay away!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cindy Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJN-NxIA63koBBWj0DYwFbF9wI0-mrFOkfgNjUeMTvn665sJA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an amazing experience with Dr. Alavi! I wish I could give 10 stars to this establishment, I highly recommend Restorative Health and Wellness.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lorna Sisk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJVlcK6u_KvRXR7kY_UD4LYRCkrxveX5UNHa_l6fCDLgsSVaA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love this place!  The office is bright and cheery.  The staff is friendly, helpful and made me feel at ease when I got there.  Devon took her time discussing my goals and needs.  She thoroughly explained my options and answered all my questions to come up with the perfect plan for me.  I was amazed with the highly personalized care and the unusual ongoing support.  A dietician is available who will also work with you to make a personalized diet you can actually work with.  They sell sensational skin care products and Devon is an expert in the aesthetic procedures she offers.  This place does it all.  Awesome!","Images":null,"When":""}]

address: 1855 E Alluvial Ave #101, Fresno, CA 93720, United States
open_hours: {"Friday":["8 AM–4 PM"],"Monday":["8 AM–5 PM"],"Saturday":["Closed"],"Sunday":["Closed"],"Thursday":["8 AM–5 PM"],"Tuesday":["8 AM–5 PM"],"Wednesday":["8 AM–4 PM"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lara Rimassa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-K8QWCN-tI7jFOYyFnIuGI3lWD_CTj1edaGvFOSnCJaMp8Z3abw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Sian’s office is kind and efficient. He is a great doctor who gives solid, practical advice. I probed a question to see if he’d say I need to lose weight after reading some of the reviews here, and he was very supportive in encouraging me to focus on healthy, safe ways to reach my goals and said to not to focus on the specific pounds. I think some people don’t realize that obesity can carry serious health risks, and a responsible doctor won’t approve surgery unless it’s safe—because your life is at stake. You can DIE if your body is too fat and you go in for surgery.

Dr. Sian is straightforward and to the point, but he also makes an effort to engage in small talk and then always brings the focus back to the medical questions, which is exactly what a good doctor should do. To leave one star reviews simply because you didn’t like hearing the truth is unfair and misleading.

He comes highly referred by Dr. Storey and the VA, and my experience reflects why—he’s an excellent physician who cares about doing things the right way.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joey Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzQek-sUHXG5OZ1zNiqro45JsavJOONmoSuYBYZxXvxBkW9A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I am writing with deep disappointment about my consultation with Dr. Kenty Sian last year. It has taken me a long time to build up the courage to even share this experience, and even longer to consider seeing another plastic surgeon because of how badly I was treated.

I came in extremely vulnerable about lifelong insecurities, seeking help for a nose that has caused me emotional pain and social isolation. Instead of feeling heard or supported, I was met with total disregard. Dr. Sian was dismissive, curt, and made me feel like I was a second-class citizen. He seemed completely uninterested in my concerns and could not wait to leave the room, treating me as if I was an inconvenience rather than a patient who deserved compassion and professionalism.

As someone living with disabilities and facing constant bullying over my appearance, it took tremendous courage to finally ask for help. The way Dr. Sian treated me only added to my anxiety and sense of worthlessness.

No patient deserves to be treated this way, especially when exposing their deepest insecurities to a medical professional. I hope this complaint helps raise awareness so that other patients are not made to feel so disregarded and disrespected.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lisa Marmolejo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULrtGv7gq57yoDpFpwYxXwj3NcWKrsWSZ-DNPqlZmT_Doa3Po=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I met this provider some years ago, and I too at that time came out of the visit and little bummed because I didnt get what I wanted out of that visit.
Now, 2024 into 2025 after an accident landing on my chest, I was sure I ruptured my implant(s).  Again, I was referred to him, and I had the most pleasant experience with the entire staff and with Dr. Sian too.
I was able to have my procedure due to health reasons and I am forever grateful for him.
I would recommend him to anyone.  I think where people get the wrong impression is that he is straight to the point.  He is not going to tell you something that you want to hear.  He is going to tell you the facts whether you like it or not.  He is very respectful, and has a good bedside manner.
I now work in the healthcare industry and I see a lot of stuff and have a better understanding of how things work.  And I truly feel that his negative reviews just may be that they didn't get what they wanted.
With that being said, I appreciate the staff and Dr. Sian.  I will go back to him if I ever want a cosmetic procedure done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Grace","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJgtqO27JGdqW91N9ulpgebvmJyA7gp63L76jFySOEebuvuWkY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Every time I come to Fresno Plastic Surgery my experience is great! From the front office staff, to the medical assistants in the back. Dr Sian is a very attentive doctor and cares about your well being. He always answers my questions and I feel he looks after the best interests of his patients!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Melanie R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKh-SZjcCeVQfk6M9m42XFhLvFw5TYCQ_oKm0mYM6L0GCQChQmB=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Sian helped me out immensely. He was very honest, informative & thorough throughout the whole process. From the consultations, during procedures, to my check-up appointments. I had over 5 keloids removed from my ears with Dr. Sian & he did a FANTASTIC job. Painless procedures, my ears healed BEAUTIFULLY & he also does my steroid injections. I recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Silvia Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXg9VhWo4ZKa6-4tyqwxA-0DeHK0nSeVhnwryqMtON7lPMNucCmQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr Sian is a great surgeon. He removed my implants and a year later he did a lift/reduction on my breast. He listened to my concerns and what I wanted. He explained the possible outcomes. The results are exactly what I wanted. I recommend Dr Sian and his staff. He will not lie to you about what your results may be and I find that refreshing!! Every time I have talked to him he is nice, professional and quick. He listens to your concerns post op. Like I said I highly recommend him and his team.I am more than satisfied with my results.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marlene S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL2bwWHqEINuwoqd4Zb-L5uLAOlm7O2R4wg5SsCz1fKgSrYoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Went in for a consult - breast reduction.

I disclosed I gained 30 pounds in the last year due to depression, but was down 10 pounds already. He was very matter of fact and came off rude. Told me he would not consider me as a candidate until I lose five more pounds and that he assumed I wanted my surgery in the summer since that was most convenient for my schedule. If only I lose five more pounds, THEN he would consider filing a claim with my insurance.

I did not like his lack of empathy and his assumption that I was there to book an appointment with him. I was there for a consult. He came off very conceited and assumed a lot about me without even pretending to care.

I do not recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jennifer Mann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL9EG0Po3-AjSsVStgVYz2fAzsW6CcbKuf1qZlkNaBvJ9B60w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dr. Sian and all the staff at Fresno Plastic Surgery were professional, friendly and efficient. They were always on time and very informative. I knew what to expect every step of the way throughout my surgery process and on the day of surgery everyone was caring and comforting. I am so pleased with the outcoming of my Otoplasty surgery. Dr. Sian listened to exactly what I wanted.
I would highly recommend him to anyone and will use him again if I need any other work done in the future.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I have a sense of relief and care now.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Judith ramirez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8iKTygUJ8QhNYKVkxktzBNdf8kKoZIK3ffv6lanPtNscCFA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I thought I was done with this horrible unprofessional place but I guess I was wrong. I had a appt with them in November for a biopsy. I had waited months for that appt and even asked for the day off to be there . I would also like to mention that it was a hour drive for me. As soon as I got to the facility I was checked in rather quickly and I thought it would be a pretty straight forward process. I was completely wrong . The provider who saw me “K.Smith” was unprofessional. As soon as she walked in she stated she did not want to be at work because of was the day after Halloween. I just laughed it off because quite frankly I didn’t care . I just wanted to get my work done and leave . Remember I came in for a biopsy !!!! Well unfortunately that wasn’t done and I was in and out of that place in less than 5 min. I had told the provider my concerns and how skin cancer runs in my family, I’ve been in pain for months and still am  and how important this biopsy was for me. She asked to see the area that was hurting and simply said “your skin is dry.” Gave me 3 tiny rubes of lotion and said I needed to see a neurologist. I was beyond upset because not only did she NOT listen to my concerns but I had wasted a day of work and drove a hour all for what? $1 worth of lotion ? The experience was so horrible I even spoke to the supervisor who said I wouldn’t be billed . I thought that was the end of this horrible place but I was wrong . Fast forward 4 months later I get a call from the billing department saying I owe $39.93 for my visit with the dermatologist. I immediately tired to dispute it but was told that since technically I was “seen” that’s what the bill was for .I would also like to add that the supervisor did offer me the option to see someone else in this facility but for what ? So my time could be wasted again ? This whole place is a absolute joke save your time and money and just go elsewhere. Theyre lucky we aren’t allowed to give the option of negative stars otherwise I would’ve have. 0 STARS","Images":null,"When":""}]

I am very grateful for all they’ve done for me.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jessica Houle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAddi86POC-MtIK7xpen_OvvKSdr3nR2Ftup6WqboRRxkQVyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough incredible things about my experience with Dr. Mo and the entire team at CSI. I underwent a breast augmentation and lift, something I had been considering for approximately eight years. During that time, I attended eight different consultations, always feeling that something was missing. I work in healthcare, and I’ve learned to trust my gut—and my gut kept telling me to keep looking.
While in Palm Desert visiting family, I came across CSI. I did only minimal research before booking a consultation, but I was immediately drawn to the clinic. From the moment I walked in, I felt comfortable—and after my consult, that feeling was completely validated.
The front staff, the atmosphere of the clinic, and Dr. Mo himself were exactly what I had been searching for all these years. The environment is warm, professional, and calming—never rushed, never impersonal.
A special mention must go to Aja, my coordinator. She is truly top-notch: understanding, responsive, compassionate, and an absolute pleasure to work with. From start to finish, she made the entire process seamless and reassuring. Every single person I interacted with at CSI was sincere, genuine, and deeply caring—and that matters more than words can express.
This was my first-ever surgery, which made the decision incredibly important to me on a personal level. I was fully prepared to keep searching until I found the perfect fit, and CSI was exactly that.
About a week into recovery, I found myself getting a bit stir-crazy—I’m a very active person and not used to slowing down. I half-jokingly asked if they could give me a “project” to focus on—skin care, anything. Aja immediately stepped in and arranged for
